command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Material UI organizes the refund_case review into a consistent static surface while leaving raw brief diagnostics, endpoint status, and CRUD framing visible.

surface.heading: refund_case Escalation Console

selected.request: Subscription renewal disputed after agent escalation.

info.label: Tool results
info.value: Purchase lookup confirmed; receipt check missing

evidence: Renewal date confirmed in purchase history.
Support note captures the customer's refund reason.
Tool call result: purchase lookup confirms the renewal date.
Receipt photo is missing before manager approval.
surface.policy: Inside exception window. Manager approval is allowed when evidence is complete; unclear duplicate-charge cases go to policy review. JSON schema blocks manager_approval while evidence.receipt_photo is missing.

handoff.title: Missing evidence update
handoff.reason: Receipt photo is missing, so the record should be updated and the agent should collect proof before manager approval.
